source_title: Grilled Eggplant with Tahini-joghurt Sauce, Bulgur with lemon and Parsley
normalized_title: Grilled Eggplant with Tahini Yogurt and Lemon Parsley Bulgur
query: Middle Eastern grilled eggplant with tahini yogurt sauce and lemon parsley bulgur

draft.title: Grilled Eggplant with Tahini Yogurt and Lemon Parsley Bulgur
draft.description: Middle Eastern grilled eggplant served with a creamy tahini yogurt sauce and bright lemon parsley bulgur. A flavorful, easy-to-make dish perfect for home cooking.

steps.text: Slice the eggplants lengthwise into 1 cm thick slices. Brush both sides with 2 tbsp olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Preheat a grill pan or outdoor grill over medium-high heat. Grill the eggplant slices for 5-7 minutes per side until tender and charred.
While the eggplant grills, rinse the bulgur under cold water. Bring 360 ml water to a boil, add bulgur, cover, and remove from heat. Let it soak for 15 minutes until water is absorbed.
Fluff the bulgur with a fork, then stir in chopped parsley, 1 tbsp olive oil, lemon juice, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
In a bowl, whisk together yogurt, tahini, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt until smooth and creamy.
Serve the grilled eggplant slices topped with tahini yogurt sauce alongside the lemon parsley bulgur.
